heading: Exemption of meats and meat food products

children.heading: Law determinative of exemption
children.label: a Law determinative of exemption
children.text: Meats and meat food products shall be exempt from the provisions of this chapter to the extent of the application or the extension thereto of the Meat Inspection Act, approved , as amended [ et seq.].March 4, 190721 U.S.C. 601

children.heading: Laws unaffected
children.label: b Laws unaffected
children.text: Nothing contained in this chapter shall be construed as in any way affecting, modifying, repealing, or superseding the provisions of section 351 of Public Health Service Act [] (relating to viruses, serums, toxins, and analogous products applicable to man); the virus, serum, toxin, and analogous products provisions, applicable to domestic animals, of the Act of Congress approved () [ et seq.]; the Filled Cheese Act of (U.S.C., 1934 ed., title 26, ch. 10), the Filled Milk Act of [ et seq.]; or the Import Milk Act of [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 26237 Stat. 832–83321 U.S.C. 15121 U.S.C. 6121 U.S.C. 141March 4, 1913June 6, 1896March 4, 1923February 15, 1927
